```{r}
#| include: false
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)

source(here("R", "utils", "chart_functions.R"))

row              <- neighborhood_metrics   |> filter(slug == current_slug)
biz_cats_row     <- biz_by_category        |> filter(slug == current_slug)
tfidf_row        <- tfidf_data             |> filter(slug == current_slug)
airbnb_tfidf_row <- airbnb_tfidf_data      |> filter(slug == current_slug)

nbhd_name    <- row$name
total_biz    <- row$total_active_businesses
diversity    <- round(row$business_diversity_index, 2)
sent_label   <- row$sentiment_label
sent_class   <- tolower(sent_label)
ai_text      <- coalesce(row$ai_summary, "_No AI summary available._")
dq_flag      <- row$data_quality_flag

has_airbnb      <- "airbnb_listing_count" %in% names(row)
airbnb_count    <- if (has_airbnb) scales::comma(row$airbnb_listing_count) else "—"
airbnb_price    <- if (has_airbnb && !is.na(row$airbnb_median_price)) paste0("$", round(row$airbnb_median_price)) else "—"
airbnb_flag     <- if (has_airbnb) row$airbnb_data_flag else "no_airbnb"
```

## `r nbhd_name`

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="52%"}
::: {.col-content}

<div class="ai-summary">`r ai_text`</div>

::: {.stat-grid}
::: {.stat-box}
<div class="stat-value">`r scales::comma(total_biz)`</div>
<div class="stat-label">Active Businesses</div>
:::
::: {.stat-box}
<div class="stat-value">`r diversity`</div>
<div class="stat-label">Diversity Index</div>
:::
::: {.stat-box}
<div class="stat-value">`r airbnb_count`</div>
<div class="stat-label">Airbnb Listings</div>
:::
::: {.stat-box}
<div class="stat-value">`r airbnb_price`</div>
<div class="stat-label">Median/Night</div>
:::
:::

Sentiment: <span class="sentiment-badge `r sent_class`">`r sent_label`</span>
`r if (dq_flag == "low_reddit") '<span class="data-quality-notice"> &nbsp;⚠ limited Reddit data</span>'`
`r if (dq_flag == "business_only") '<span class="data-quality-notice"> &nbsp;no Reddit data</span>'`
`r if (has_airbnb && airbnb_flag == "no_airbnb") '<span class="data-quality-notice"> &nbsp;no Airbnb data</span>'`

::: {.tfidf-anchor}
```{r}
#| fig-height: 2.8
#| fig-width: 5.2
if (dq_flag != "business_only" && nrow(tfidf_row) > 0) {
  make_tfidf_chart(tfidf_row, "Residents (Reddit)",
                   bar_color   = "#4a6b7a",
                   title_label = "Resident Voice — Reddit (TF-IDF)")
}
```
:::

:::
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.col-content}

```{r}
#| fig-height: 3.2
#| fig-width: 5.5
if (nrow(biz_cats_row) > 0) {
  make_business_bar_chart(biz_cats_row, nbhd_name)
}
```

::: {.tfidf-anchor}
```{r}
#| fig-height: 2.8
#| fig-width: 5.5
if (airbnb_flag != "no_airbnb" && nrow(airbnb_tfidf_row) > 0) {
  make_tfidf_chart(airbnb_tfidf_row, "Visitors (Airbnb)",
                   bar_color   = "#7a5c35",
                   title_label = "Visitor Voice — Airbnb Reviews (TF-IDF)")
}
```
:::

:::
:::

:::
